description: Serves WPF Dev Pack knowledge topics to AI agents from a local repo clone.
name: io.github.christian289/wpf-dev-pack-mcp

environmentVariables.name: WPFDEVPACK_REPO_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to a local clone of christian289/dotnet-with-claudecode (the knowledge source). Alternatively set it once via /wpf-dev-pack:set-repo-path.
